title: Orphan Module Allowlist Schema
description: Schema for allowlisting known orphan module violations

path.description: Path to the module relative to repo root

missingFile.description: Name of the missing required file

reason.description: Explanation for why this violation is allowlisted

owner.description: Team or individual responsible for this module

reviewBy.description: Date by which this allowlist entry should be reviewed

ticketRef.description: Reference to tracking ticket for remediation
